query:
SELECT 
  SUM(totalAmount)/100 as gross_total,
  SUM(centralGst)/100 as total_cgst,
  SUM(stateGst)/100 as total_sgst,
  (SUM(totalAmount) - SUM(centralGst) - SUM(stateGst))/100 as taxable_amount,
  SUM(deliveryCharge)/100 as delivery_charges,
  SUM(discountAmount)/100 as discounts
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-04-01' 
  AND createdAt < '2026-05-01' 
  AND orderStatus != 'cancelled';

  SUM(centralGst)/100 as total_cgst,
  SUM(stateGst)/100 as total_sgst,
  (SUM(totalAmount) - SUM(centralGst) - SUM(stateGst))/100 as taxable_amount,
  SUM(deliveryCharge)/100 as delivery_charges,
  SUM(discountAmount)/100 as discounts
FROM orders

  AND createdAt < '2026-05-01' 
  AND orderStatus != 'cancelled';
